overview.description: The iShares MBS ETF (MBB) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks a market-weighted index of investment-grade mortgage pass-through securities. The index includes fixed and floating rate securities issued by GNMA, FNMA and FHLMC. MBB was launched on Mar 13, 2007 and is issued by BlackRock.
